programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat
programme.desc: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Jack & Tyler’s Colorful Curb Appeal
programme.desc: Jack and Tyler have made their home picture-perfect, but now it’s time for the exterior to shine.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.sub-title: Kayla & Ryan’s Toddler To-Do List
programme.desc: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.

programme.title: Tiny BNB
programme.sub-title: Sleek & Scandinavian Cozy Cabins / Tiny Treehouse Overlooks
programme.desc: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.

programme.sub-title: Under the Stars / Tiny Cozy Cabins
programme.desc: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.

programme.sub-title: Cabins, Caves, and Kettle & Crumb / Southern Stays in the Trees

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.sub-title: Erin + Jesse: An Attic Transformed
programme.desc: Armed with fresh ideas, Charli and Kylie turn a forgotten attic into a welcoming flex room.

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.sub-title: Miya + Edgar: A Living Room Reimagined
programme.desc: Kylie and Charli bring smart solutions, bold materials, and thoughtful styling to a first home.

programme.title: Apartment Therapy
programme.sub-title: Shalese + Irene: A Bedroom That Is Just Right
programme.desc: Charli and Kylie transform Irene’s closet and turn her bedroom into a beautiful retreat.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.sub-title: It’s a Mood: Cara Woodhouse’s Noyack Cottage
programme.desc: Step inside Noyack Cottage, a stunning Sag Harbor vacation home transformed by Cara Woodhouse.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.sub-title: Prismatic & Patterned LA Bungalow
programme.desc: Peek inside Los Angeles-based designer Dani Dazey’s pink bungalow in Highland Park, California.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.sub-title: Modern & Minimal South End Makeover
programme.desc: Leia T. Ward transforms a traditional home into a modern, open floorplan with elevated style.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.sub-title: Peaceful Palm Desert Remodel
programme.desc: Anne-Marie Barton creates a spirit of wellness in this charming Palm Springs remodel.

programme.title: The Vision Maker
programme.sub-title: Vero's Traditional & Modern Mix / Lexy's Comfy Condo "Glam Up"
programme.desc: Anne-Marie Barton offers homeowners a transformation that will change their spaces and their lives.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Container Homes: All Shapes and Sizes
programme.desc: Jillian visits two homeowners who have taken containers—and creativity—to extraordinary new heights.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time: Fairy Tale Homes
programme.desc: Jillian explores some of the most whimsical homes in Southern California.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: From Cats to Co-Living: A Place for Everyone
programme.desc: Jillian dives into community living, exploring how we create spaces that bring us closer together.

programme.title: Alt Home
programme.sub-title: Innovation, Design and Style: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Jillian learns how history inspires the future, touring boundary-pushing homes with a modern twist.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.sub-title: The Paglia's "Executive Decision"
programme.desc: Captain Boomies joins the Paglias aboard their yacht Executive Decision for a deep-sea adventure.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.sub-title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"
programme.desc: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.sub-title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"
programme.desc: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.

programme.title: The Yacht Life
programme.sub-title: The Gambin's "Offline"
programme.desc: Welcome aboard Offline, a vintage-inspired yacht packed with cutting-edge amenities.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Going Off the Grid
programme.desc: The Finn's are heading to the Texas backcountry to build their dream home off the grid.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Let Go and Let Gary
programme.desc: With Builder Gary’s help, Leah’s hoping to get this house back on track.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Corbels, Old Doors, & Cupolas
programme.desc: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Like Watching Mortar Dry
programme.desc: The mortar on the exterior stone is finally dry, but hasn’t turned out at all like Leah envisioned.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Bring Your Daughter to Work Year
programme.desc: Leah focuses on interior selections, but choosing paint colors proves to be more difficult than she thought.

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: The Final Push
programme.desc: With the end of the project in sight, everyone’s working hard to make sure the Finn's make their move-in date!

programme.title: Home to Homestead
programme.sub-title: Making the Date
programme.desc: Leah’s heard that the last 10% of the build takes 90% of the effort … and it couldn’t be more true.
